summary: Excellent tight performance with great energy and a memorable Good Lovin’ finale, though recording details are unclear
review: The single fan review praises the show as a “gem,” noting that the band was tight, stretched out plenty, delivered on‑time vocals and sustained high energy across both sets. Bob Weir’s enthusiasm is highlighted with his closing of Good Lovin’ saying “And leave it on!” No specific recording comments were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review emphasizes a strong musical performance; lack of recording information prevents higher confidence, but the show quality alone merits a high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments on soundboard, audience mix, clarity or other technical aspects.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Both sets described as energetic and well‑executed, with a particularly enthusiastic closing of Good Lovin’.

band_member_comments.Bob: Bob felt the energy and closed Good Lovin' with "And leave it on!"
